name: zoom-team-chat-search
description: Read-only Zoom Team Chat search, meeting transcripts, and AI-Companion meeting summaries. Zero-config: no client secret, no setup.
long_description: Provides 20 read-only tools for Zoom Team Chat (channels, messages, threads, attachments, shared spaces, pinned messages) and meeting transcripts. Includes manual cross-channel message search (parallel fan-out) and Zoom AI Companion meeting summaries. Pre-configured for the PortSwigger Zoom app — Swiggers double-click to install and authorise once with no credentials to enter.
